CustomField.formula:
CASE(TEXT( Ticket_Parking_Type__c ), 'BO', 'Bowl Game', 'CO', 'Complimentary', 'FCM', 'Foleys Club Membership', 'LOT', 'Lottery', 'PL', 'Parking Lottery', 'EX', 'Parking Lottery Exclude', 'SF', 'Season 1842', 'SB', 'Season Bench', 'SC', 'Season Club', 'SL', 'Season Loge', 'SPA', 'Season Pass', 'SPF', 'Season Preferred', 'SS', 'Season Shamrock Game', 'ST', 'Season Ticket', 'SG', 'Single Game', 'Single Game Exception', 'Single Game Exception', 'GM', 'Single Game Purchase', 'SO', 'South Club', 'LA', 'Lottery Air Force', 'LB', 'Lottery Arizona State', 'LZ', 'Lottery Army', 'L8', 'Lottery Ball State', 'LS', 'Lottery Boston College', 'M2', 'Lottery Bowling Green', 'LC', 'Lottery BYU', 'M8', 'Lottery California', 'M5', 'Lottery Cincinnati', 'LT', 'Lottery Clemson', 'L1', 'Lottery Duke', 'LM', 'Lottery Florida State', 'L6', 'Lottery Georgia', 'LU', 'Lottery Georgia Tech', 'LN', 'Lottery Louisville', 'M7', 'Lottery Marshall', 'L2', 'Lottery Miami', 'L7', 'Lottery Miami (Ohio)', 'LD', 'Lottery Michigan', 'LE', 'Lottery Michigan State', 'LF', 'Lottery Navy', 'L4', 'Lottery NC State', 'L3', 'Lottery Nevada', 'M1', 'Lottery New Mexico', 'LO', 'Lottery North Carolina', 'LP', 'Lottery Northwestern', 'M6', 'Lottery Ohio State', 'LG', 'Lottery Oklahoma', 'LH', 'Lottery Pittsburgh', 'LI', 'Lottery Purdue', 'LQ', 'Lottery Rice', 'LJ', 'Lottery Stanford', 'LR', 'Lottery Syracuse', 'LK', 'Lottery Temple', 'LV', 'Lottery Texas', 'M3', 'Lottery Toledo', 'LW', 'Lottery UMass', 'M9', 'Lottery UNLV', 'LL', 'Lottery USC', 'L9', 'Lottery Vanderbilt', 'LX', 'Lottery Virginia', 'L5', 'Lottery Virginia Tech', 'LY', 'Lottery Wake Forest', 'M4', 'Lottery Wisconsin', 'MA', 'Lottery Tennessee State', 'MB', 'Lottery Central Michigan',
'' )
CustomField.label: Ticket Parking Type Formula
